verification.stage: post-G1 fix: 21/21 admin/ tests pass in 5.2s

test_run.g1_resolution_note: Two fixes landed: (a) added await-placeholder-visible before keyboard.type in both helpers, and (b) scoped the palette item locator to .palette-item to disambiguate from the TopBar workspace switcher's hidden <option>Manage workspaces…</option>. The collision was specific to workspace-rename — 'Manage users' and 'Connect an MCP client' have no <option> twins. Fixed defensively in both helpers.

g1_resolution.resolution: Two test-helper edits: (a) added await-placeholder-visible before keyboard.type to prevent the keystroke race, and (b) scoped the palette-item locator to .palette-item to avoid colliding with the TopBar workspace-switcher's hidden <option>Manage workspaces…</option>. The actual root cause was (b) — the TopBar collision; (a) was a defensive addition. Diagnostic credit: --reporter=line surfaced the locator-resolved-to-<option> trace that the default reporter buried.

convergence.summary: 16/16 constraints SATISFIED, 10/10 required truths SATISFIED at TESTED, binding RT-1 closed, 0 gaps remaining. 21/21 admin/ e2e tests green in 5.2s. Bundle delta +3.73 KB << 30 KB. 3/3 tensions confirmed; 0 reopened. Reversibility log: 0 ONE_WAY actions.
